transcript.text: Living in Lafayette, V-Log, the 25th of April, 26th of April, 2013.
I got up at 6 o'clock.
Well, alarm went off at 6 o'clock today, but I slept in until 6.30.
And then I got up and had my oatmeal and fruit and protein powder.
And then I went into Boulder because I was going to pick up my bike from the bike shop.
They were putting it together.
It took like a couple weeks because they had to order like a new headset and stem and stuff.
And so I was just at home all day long.
Helping my mom clean up her porch and then putting my brother's bike together.
I had to go around our different bike shops looking for left brake lever and cables and stuff.
Went to this place called Community Bikes Shop where they sell like all these used parts.
It's pretty cool.
And then I was going to learn how to do my bike computer and the GPS watch,
But I didn't have time.
I was just hanging out with my mom, you know, went for a walk, went to the dog park and stuff.
But, yeah, so tomorrow I'm going to stay here all day long.
But I got my bike back, and I'll do the video about my bike tomorrow.
But, yeah, tomorrow I'm going to figure out how to do these things and then go out and ride a little bit
And finish up my bike.
I had to pick up my bike before they were done because the place was closing.
So, yeah, and now it's late.
So, yeah, I didn't really do much.
Oh, I watched this TV show called Vikings that I like on the History Channel.
Like three episodes during the day.
But today was warm.
Oh, my God.
It's like summer now, so I'm excited.
Boom.
So, yeah.
Anyways, that's that.
Okay, peace out.
